role_context: User ek supplier hai jo {city} mein based hai. Unke {active_loads} active load(s) hain, {pending_bookings} pending booking(s) hain. Verification status: {verification_status}. Bhasha: {locale}.
role_super_load: Ye supplier Super Loads request kar sakta hai jisme TranZfort payment guarantee aur admin-managed trucker assignment milta hai.
role_unverified: Is supplier ne abhi verification complete nahi kiya hai. Verified hone tak load post nahi kar sakte.
capabilities: Suppliers ye kar sakte hain: load post karo, bookings manage karo (approve/reject), shipment track karo, Super Loads request karo, truckers se chat karo, trip progress dekho.
greeting_context: Aapke {active_loads} active load(s) aur {pending_bookings} booking(s) approval ke liye pending hain.
